falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 65 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 65 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a potential reversal rather than continuation of the pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key resistance level would invalidate the pattern's historical behavior (bottom_2022_may_luna), which typically failed to sustain momentum past this threshold.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 3x the 30-day average on two consecutive days within the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume surge would indicate a fundamental shift in market sentiment, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a potential blowoff top or breakout.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
